title: iberis linearifolia
intro: Iberis linearifolia, also known as dwarf candytuft, is a low-growing, evergreen perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Western Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful for treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Iberis linearifolia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and ointments, and is often dried or made into a tincture for later use.
